body:
Elena, great catching up with you at the [Breakthrough Energy Summit](events/breakthrough-energy-summit) last week — I've been thinking a lot about the conversation we had around grid-edge infrastructure and how thinly covered that space still is at the seed stage. I wanted to follow up on the two deals I mentioned: one is a solid AI-driven demand-response platform that's closing its seed round in the next few weeks, and I'd love to explore whether there's appetite on your end for a co-investment conversation. The team has deep roots in utility operations, which I think addresses the go-to-market risk that kills most of these early-stage grid plays. If the timing works, I'm thinking a quick call mid-next week would let us compare notes before either of us moves further in diligence. Let me know what your calendar looks like and we can find something that works.

Amara
